portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: We are a global production company specialized in impossible video projects. We offer all solutions within a Film or advertising campaign with the highest quality cinematic deliveries for our clients. We operate as a technological studio, we have an in-house team of experts in
portfolio.highlight: VFX, 3D, CGI, animations, art direction, and colorists.
portfolio.descriptionEnd: Plus experienced drone and FPV pilots.

about.title: Defying
about.description1: Brauer Vision Films is not just a production company. It's a visual laboratory where the boundary between real and digital ceases to exist. Specialists in
about.description1End: , we create entire universes from scratch.
about.description2: Whether it's a charismatic Pixar-style character or a hyper-realistic fluid simulation, our obsession is detail. We also apply this technical excellence in productions for local businesses and events, bringing the "cinema look" to all formats.
about.marquee: BRAUER VISION FILMS /// VFX /// CGI /// 3D /// FUTURE /// BRAUER VISION FILMS /// VFX /// CGI /// 3D /// FUTURE
